topic.title: AI video workflow and Gru training - Saturday, April 11
topic.text:
AI video workflow and Gru training - Saturday, April 11

INFO 7375 — Branding & AI | Saturday, April 11
12:00 PM ET (recurring weekly through May 16)

Join Zoom: https://northeastern.zoom.us/j/93229181753?pwd=hXje31T45VKiBrVl4Fc5O7TT57JIwk.1
Meeting ID: 932 2918 1753 | Passcode: 809591

Schedule:
• 12:00 PM — Class begins
• 12:45 PM — AI Video Training
• 2:00 PM — Gru Training
